title: monarda citriodora var. austromontana
intro: Monarda citriodora var. austromontana, also known as the Lemon Bee Balm or Lemon Horsemint, is a variety of the Monarda citriodora plant, a member of the mint family native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of citral and limonene compounds. The health benefits of Monarda citriodora var. austromontana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, or as a natural remedy for colds and flu.
